description: PULSE WITH ENERGYGift your feet an energy drink with the reebok ZigTech shoes. This reebok ZigDhoni shoe, dedicated to the captain of the Indian cricket Team who led the nation to an ICC World Cup victory this year, these are Reebok’s most technically advanced training shoes. The ZigTech range allows key leg muscles to strain less so that you can do more with that energy. Using a patented sole technology, Reebok’s ZigTech model of shoes conserve and return energy offering a soft and springy ride. The zigs in these shoes absorb vibrations from the impact and take that energy around to return them to the runner in the form of a quiet, smooth springy effect. Promising mush lesser muscle activation, this springy move allows the wearer to run longer.Invisible force trailing alongThe newest of running and cross training shoes from Reebok, the shoe is created with a technology the stretches out a little to accommodate those with wider feet; but on the whole, it’s created for a snug Fit and in a true to size format. The Reebok Zig range of shoes is created with a zig zag outsole made of carbon rubber heel. The Zig technology absorbs impact during initial heel strike and sends a wave of momentum along the entire length of the foot, propelling the individual forward, adding greater traction. Such has been the propulsion factor that many sportspersons have actually claimed that they’ve felt some invisible force pushing them forward.Substantial sole for stable runsCreated with a lightweight fabric upper, there is ample ventilation for the feet keeping the feet dry and comfortable even during a heavy round of exercise and training. The lightweight of the upper is contrasted with a slightly more substantial sole to ensure ample stability to the wearer, making it possibly the best sneaker ever created for the serious runner or cross trainer. So just add on an iPod and run away to health.Upper Synthetic and mesh uppers with synthetic overlays provide breath ability White lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Mesh tongue and perforated toe box for greater breath ability Dhoni signature graphic on the insole Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture management Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole ZigTech's unique zigzag sole designed to optimize energy return, helps to propel you forward with each step and reduces wear and tear on your shins by 20% Performance design for lateral support and stability Forefoot flex grooves for flexibility and better running performance Multi-surface outsole for optimal traction TPU medial post for midfoot pronation control Carbon-rubber heel strike offers durability and traction on any surface Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
